DISCOVERY 612, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL A WRITTEN RESPONSE AND DOCUMENTS TO RESPONDENT'S DOCUMENT INSPECTION AND REPRODUCTION DEMAND AND FOR SANCTIONS - TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: RESPONDENT'S MOTION TO COMPEL A WRITTEN RESPONSE AND DOCUMENTS RESPONSIVE TO RESPONDENT'S INSPECTION AND REPRODUCTION DEMAND IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PETITIONER'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PETITIONER IS ORDERED TO RESPOND AND TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST PETITIONER IN THE AMOUNT OF $656.25, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
